Provider identifier for the root folder
Broadcast call letters for the channel
Virtual Channel Number assigned to the channel
Source identifier for the channel feed
Display title for the channel or asset
Short description displayed in the guide
Mode used when the channel link is launched

Human-readable name of the asset (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute)
Asset classification (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute). Valid values: movie, package, preview, poster
Content provider name (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute)
Product type (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute). Valid values: MOD, SVOD
Major version number of the asset record (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute)
Minor version number of the asset record (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute)
Date the asset record was created (CableLabs ADI 1.1 AMS attribute, format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss)
Content rating (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data). MPAA: G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17, NR. TV: TV-Y, TV-Y7, TV-G, TV-PG, TV-14, TV-MA
Content genre (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data). E.g., Action, Comedy, Drama, Horror, Documentary
Content duration in seconds (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data)
Four-digit year the content was originally released (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data)
Short synopsis for guide display — typically 1-2 sentences (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data)
Example_Value: A thrilling action film set in the near future.

Description: Long synopsis for asset detail page — full paragraph (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data)
Example_Value: In the year 2050, one hero must save the world from an unstoppable threat.

Description: Suggested retail price in USD (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data, two decimal places)
Start of the content availability window (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data, format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss)
End of the content availability window (CableLabs ADI 1.1 App_Data, format: YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss)
